title: Lapis Tools
description: This mod adds lapis tools, but also comes with a perk of high enchantability
body:
**Lapis Tools**
===============
This mod adds lapis tools, but also comes with a perk of high enchantability of 25

**Description**:
- Enchantibility: 25
  
  Info: Enchantibility means how common rare enchantments can be enchanted on this tool. The higher the enchantability, the better enchantments you will get when enchanting the tool.

  Wooden tools: 15

  Stone tools: 5
  
  Iron tools: 14

  Gold tools: 22
  
  Diamond tools: 10

  Netherite tools: 15

- Knock back resistance: 0.1
  Info: Only Netherite has 0.1

Recipe:

- Sword:
  - 2 Lapis lazulis
  - 1 Stick

  ![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2cf049eeef12df9e1e9f35cc080b84941c216f3.png)

- Pickaxe:
  - 3 Lapis lazulis
  - 2 Sticks

![Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f351d6b68eb26faa6151751c4914d06a38680983.png)

- Axe:
  - 3 Lapis lazulis
  - 2 Sticks

![AXee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc8bb149d03e0702d0679de2bf1c98cae76374e4.png)

- Shovel:
  - 1 Lapis lazuli
  - 2 Sticks

![Shovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73f5050786bbf09ffd9118c8b0522f8467684ce.png)

- Hoe
  - 2 Lapis lazulis
  - 2 Sticks

![hoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf84d61f8484a1d7b3b722e6d29e65688ed52d07.png)

_**Note**_:

- The items in the recipe are the old textures
